channel.title: Nature Physics
channel.description: Nature Physics offers news and reviews alongside top-quality research papers in a monthly publication, covering the entire spectrum of physics. Physics addresses the properties and interactions of matter and energy, and plays a key role in the development of a broad range of technologies. To reflect this, Nature Physics covers all areas of pure and applied physics research. The journal focuses on core physics disciplines, but is also open to a broad range of topics whose central theme falls within the bounds of physics.
channel.dc:rights: © 2026 Macmillan Publishers Limited, part of Springer Nature. All rights reserved.
channel.prism:copyright: © 2026 Macmillan Publishers Limited, part of Springer Nature. All rights reserved.

item.title: Active assembly and non-reciprocal dynamics of elastic membranes
item.content:encoded:
Nature Physics, Published online: 02 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41567-026-03215-5

The microtubule–kinesin system is a well-known active matter system. Now it is shown that a microtubule-based active fluid can assemble adhesive non-thermal fibres into a membrane-like structure.
item.dc:title: Active assembly and non-reciprocal dynamics of elastic membranes
item.dc:creator: John Berezney
Sattvic Ray
Itamar Kolvin
Fridtjof Brauns
Sihan Chen
Mark Bowick
Seth Fraden
Vincenzo Vitelli
Zvonimir Dogic

item.title: Frieze charge stripes in a correlated kagome superconductor
item.content:encoded:
Nature Physics, Published online: 02 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41567-026-03232-4

In a kagome superconductor, sublattice degrees of freedom are shown to govern a distinct density wave phase featuring chiral textures and symmetry properties that align with one of the fundamental frieze symmetry groups.
item.dc:title: Frieze charge stripes in a correlated kagome superconductor
item.dc:creator: Siyu Cheng
Keyu Zeng
Yi Liu
Christopher Candelora
Ziqiang Wang
Guang-Han Cao
Ilija Zeljkovic

item.title: Publisher Correction: Driving Floquet physics with excitonic fields
item.content:encoded:
Nature Physics, Published online: 31 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41567-026-03264-w

Publisher Correction: Driving Floquet physics with excitonic fields
item.dc:title: Publisher Correction: Driving Floquet physics with excitonic fields
item.dc:creator: Vivek Pareek
David R. Bacon
Xing Zhu
Yang-Hao Chan
Fabio Bussolotti
Marcos G. Menezes
Nicholas S. Chan
Joel Pérez Urquizo
Kenji Watanabe

Enrico Perfetto
Michael K. L. Man

Kuan Eng Johnson Goh
